assertions.rationale: Skill's grouping decision tree leads to .combine or .ignore for product cards

assertions.text: Hides decorative star images from VoiceOver
assertions.rationale: Individual star images should not each be separate VoiceOver stops

assertions.text: Provides a natural-language rating description (e.g., '4 out of 5 stars') not raw numbers
assertions.rationale: Skill emphasizes human-readable values; WITHOUT often leaves raw star count
